verse_text: But I say to you that whoever looks at a woman to lust for her has already committed adultery with her in his heart.

links.context: , 2 St. Gregory writes that Eve sinned and "came to death" because she allowed desire to enter her soul through the "windows" of her eyes. He warns the faithful to be careful that we not even look on what is forbidden. "If I defile my mind in thought, I can never be the inheritance of Him who is the Author of purity" (see [[MAT.5:27]], [[MAT.5:28]]; [[1PE.1:13]]).
